summary: Matched and substantially improved Dolphin PAD support code in extern/dolphin, especially pad.c. The PR added real implementations and signature/header fixes for PAD sampling, reset/recalibration, motor control, polling callbacks, and wireless-pad-related state. decomp.dev reported 9 newly matched functions totaling +1712 matched bytes and improvements to PADRead, PADTypeAndStatusCallback, and PADInit, while the author noted that some matching issues remained and the nonmatching object was at least functional.
what_changed: Added extern/dolphin/src/dolphin/pad/__pad.h with local/internal prototypes for SamplingHandler, PADSetSamplingCallback, SIRefreshSamplingRate, SIIsChanBusy, SIRegisterPollingHandler, and SIUnregisterPollingHandler.
Changed PADRead's public signature from void PADRead(struct PADStatus*) to u32 PADRead(struct PADStatus*) and updated its implementation to return a channel bitmask result.
Changed SIGetResponse from void to int in OSSerial.h and OSSerial.c so PAD code can branch on its success/failure return value.

Implemented or completed major PAD code paths in pad.c, including PADTypeAndStatusCallback, PADReceiveCheckCallback, PADRecalibrate, PADInit, PADRead, PADSetSamplingRate, SIRefreshSamplingRate, OnReset, SamplingHandler, PADSetSamplingCallback, and __PADDisableRecalibration.
Added WirelessUnk[4], SamplingRate, and SamplingCallback state in pad.c; symbols.txt correspondingly split Origin from size 0x40 to 0x30 and added WirelessUnk at 0x804A89E0.

Adjusted symbols.txt names and object layout: SISetSamplingRate was renamed to PADSetSamplingRate, PADOnReset was renamed to OnReset, ResetFunctionInfo was reduced to 0x10, and XYNTSC/XYPAL/lbl_80402E00 were exposed as separate data objects.

Reworked PADInit to initialize wireless-pad fix data from __OSWirelessPadFixMode, fill WirelessUnk command words, set RecalibrateBits when __PADFixBits is nonzero, then call PADSetSamplingRate(0), register reset handling, and reset all four channels.
Reworked PADRecalibrate to incorporate PendingBits, clear PendingBits, update ResettingBits/EnabledBits/RecalibrateBits, call SIDisablePolling on affected enabled reset bits, and return TRUE.
Reworked PADRead error and status handling around PendingBits, ResettingBits, EnabledBits, SIIsChanBusy, SIGetStatus(chan), SIGetResponse, SIGetType, MakeStatus, and origin-update transfers.

Changed the XY sampling-rate table structure from an 8-bit line field to a u16 line plus padding, adjusted NTSC/PAL constants, and made PADSetSamplingRate interrupt-guarded while caching the requested SamplingRate.
Added reset-time sampling-callback cleanup and a polling handler path that calls SamplingCallback inside a temporary OSContext.
Added __PADDisableRecalibration as a public declaration and implementation backed by the absolute GameChoice byte at 0x800030E3.
smart_moves: Correcting API return types in headers and source, especially PADRead returning u32 and SIGetResponse returning int, enabled PAD code to express control flow that depends on hardware/SI success status.
Splitting Origin and WirelessUnk in BSS fixed the data layout instead of forcing an oversized Origin array to cover unrelated state.
Using a local __pad.h kept internal PAD/SI prototypes near pad.c without overexposing them in the public Dolphin PAD header.
The implementation uses string literals "A" and "B" as SI transfer commands in several places, matching the SDK-style command-byte usage visible in the diff and avoiding extra frame temporaries.
PADSetSamplingRate now stores SamplingRate and SIRefreshSamplingRate simply reapplies it, a clean reconstruction of cached sampling-rate behavior.
The code explicitly documents a matching tradeoff inside PADRead: a seemingly correct PADReset(0) path was left under #if 0 because it created many more register swaps.
Updating symbols.txt alongside source changes captured newly understood function/data boundaries, which is important for future matching and map hygiene.
decomp_lessons: When a function's original return value is used by callers, fix the SDK/header signature before forcing call sites to match a void prototype; this PR did that for PADRead and SIGetResponse.
Data-object size corrections can unlock source matching: Origin was 0x30 and WirelessUnk was a separate 0x10 object, not one 0x40 Origin block.
For Dolphin SDK modules, internal static callbacks and SI helper declarations may need a private source-local header rather than the public include.
Absolute-address state such as GameChoice at 0x800030E3 may be necessary to match SDK behavior for hidden global flags.
Interrupt-disable/restore placement affects matching in hardware-facing code; PADRead, PADRecalibrate, PADSetSamplingRate, and __PADDisableRecalibration all rely on carefully scoped interrupt guards.
Matching hardware/SI code often requires reconstructing exact bitmasks and channel-bit shifts such as 0x80000000 >> chan rather than using higher-level abstractions.
If a source transformation is logically cleaner but worsens register allocation, preserving the uglier inline sequence can be the better matching tactic, as noted by the PADRead #if 0 comment.
naming_conventions: Renamed symbol SISetSamplingRate to PADSetSamplingRate at .text:0x8034DDAC.
Renamed symbol PADOnReset to OnReset at .text:0x8034E6A0, matching the static reset callback name in pad.c.
Internal PAD callbacks use CamelCase SDK-style names such as PADTypeAndStatusCallback, PADReceiveCheckCallback, PADOriginUpdateCallback, SamplingHandler, and OnReset.
Global/static PAD bitfields retain SDK-style names: ResettingBits, PendingBits, WaitingBits, CheckingBits, EnabledBits, RecalibrateBits.
Separate data table names XYNTSC and XYPAL were added for sampling-rate timing tables.
The private header was named __pad.h, consistent with other internal Dolphin headers such as os/__os.h.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Changed XY.line to u16 and added explicit padding to match table layout and data symbol boundaries.
Introduced dummy stack padding variables such as u8 _[4] in PADRead and OnReset to influence stack/register layout.
Used string literals "A" and "B" directly as SITransfer command buffers instead of local integer frame variables where that better matched emitted code.
Changed PADReceiveCheckCallback from a three-argument callback including OSContext* to a two-argument form used with SIGetTypeAsync.
Used SIGetType(chan) and SIGetStatus(chan) forms in PADRead/PADControlMotor instead of relying only on cached Type or full SI status word shifts.
Added a private static PADCallback typedef and a static PADSetSamplingCallback returning the previous callback, matching SDK callback swap behavior.
Kept an inline pending-reset sequence in PADRead instead of calling PADReset(0), with a diff comment saying the call path caused many more register swaps.
Changed __PADFixBits from a definition in pad.c to an extern declaration, avoiding duplicate ownership of that global while preserving references.
review_feedback: No human review comments were present in the provided slice.
The PR body cautioned: "Still some matching issues, but the nonmatching object seems to at least be functional."

decomp.dev reported 9 new matches in main/dolphin/pad/pad: OnReset, PADSetSamplingRate, PADReceiveCheckCallback, PADRecalibrate, __PADDisableRecalibration, PADControlMotor, SamplingHandler, PADSetSamplingCallback, and SIRefreshSamplingRate.
decomp.dev reported unmatched-function improvements for PADRead from 15.74% to 96.17%, PADTypeAndStatusCallback from 0.49% to 54.68%, and PADInit from 44.36% to 82.71%.
decomp.dev reported one regression in main/dolphin/os/OSSerial SIGetResponse from 6.12% to 2.04%, likely tied to the signature/return-type change.
follow_up_queries: Investigate remaining nonmatching portions of PADRead after this PR, especially the last 3.83% mismatch reported by decomp.dev.
Continue PADTypeAndStatusCallback matching from 54.68%, focusing on wireless controller branches and SITransfer command construction.
Continue PADInit matching from 82.71%, especially wireless fix-mode initialization and RecalibrateBits behavior.
Revisit SIGetResponse after its return type changed to int, since decomp.dev reported a small regression in OSSerial matching.
Audit whether __PADDisableRecalibration and GameChoice bit 0x40 interactions are used elsewhere in the Dolphin SDK codebase.
